expectations.text: Gathers project context silently first (reads CLAUDE.md, package.json, etc.)
expectations.evidence: No context gathering. Jumps straight to implementation.

expectations.text: Asks clarifying questions about the existing tech stack and design system
expectations.evidence: No questions asked. Asks 'Want me to implement this?' at end but no clarifying questions.

expectations.text: Writes a spec to specs/dark-mode.md or similar descriptive filename
expectations.evidence: No spec file written. Plan is inline.

expectations.text: Spec addresses persistence mechanism (localStorage, cookie, or system preference)
Includes an explicit approval gate - waits for user sign-off before coding
expectations.evidence: Already wrote implementation code. 'Want me to implement this?' is asked after code, not before.
